---
title: "Use Case Title"
subtitle: "Brief description of the analysis"
author: "Author"
date: last-modified
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
title-block-banner: false

format:
  html:
    title-block-banner: false

title-block-style: default

bibliography: references.bib
---

![](../images/amber_on_leaf_circle.png){.sonrai-logo}

## Introduction

Provide context and motivation for the analysis. What is the biological or analytical question? Why does it matter?

## Methods

### Data

Describe the dataset: source, sample size, experimental design.

### Analysis Pipeline

Describe the tools, software, and statistical methods used.

## Results

Present key findings with figures and tables. Use code chunks to generate results dynamically where possible.

```{r}
#| label: example-plot
#| eval: false
# Example R code chunk
# library(ggplot2)
# ggplot(data, aes(x, y)) + geom_point()
```

## Conclusion

Summarise the main findings and their implications. Note any limitations.

## References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
